name: VTS Commercial Real Estate Asset Management REST API
what_it_does: VTS commercial real estate asset management REST API for landlords, REITs, asset managers, and commercial brokers to manage property leasing pipeline, tenant relationships, deal tracking, portfolio performance, and market analytics — enabling automated commercial real estate deal management, lease administration, tenant experience, and market intelligence through VTS's dominant CRE leasing and asset management platform covering 9 billion sq ft of commercial space globally. Enables AI agents to manage deal pipeline for commercial lease prospect and proposal tracking automation, handle space availability for office, retail, and industrial availability management automation, access tenant data for tenant relationship and lease term management automation, retrieve portfolio analytics for building performance and occupancy analytics automation, manage lease commencement for lease execution and administration automation, handle market data for CRE market rental rate and demand analytics automation, access building operations for tenant request and maintenance management automation, retrieve tour tracking for property showing and visit management automation, manage stack plan for floor plate and space utilization visualization automation, and integrate VTS with CoStar, ARGUS, and property management systems for commercial real estate operations automation.
use_cases: Tracking commercial real estate leasing deals and proposals for asset manager leasing automation agents
Managing space availability and portfolio occupancy for REIT asset management automation agents
Analyzing commercial real estate market conditions for leasing strategy automation agents
Administering tenant relationships and lease renewals for property management automation agents
not_for: Residential property management (VTS is commercial real estate — office, retail, industrial — not residential)
Consumer property search (VTS is B2B landlord/broker platform, not consumer property listing site)
Property valuation and appraisal (VTS is leasing and asset management, not AVM or appraisal tool)
best_when: A commercial real estate landlord, REIT, asset manager, or CRE broker wanting AI agents to automate deal pipeline management, space availability tracking, tenant relationship management, and portfolio performance analytics through VTS's industry-leading CRE platform.
avoid_when: LANDLORD OR BROKER RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: VTS is B2B platform for CRE professionals; automated open access assumption creates access_required without landlord or broker VTS account; automated must be or represent a CRE landlord or broker using VTS. CRE DOMAIN EXPERTISE REQUIRED: Commercial real estate deal and lease structures are complex (gross, NNN, modified gross leases); automated non-expert assumption creates incorrect_lease_structure for CRE-specific terms; automated must involve CRE professionals in workflow design. MARKET DATA IS VTS-NETWORK SOURCED: VTS market analytics come from anonymized VTS network data; automated public market data assumption creates VTS-proprietary data for market intelligence not publicly available; automated must understand VTS market data is based on VTS network activity. INTEGRATION WITH PROPERTY MANAGEMENT REQUIRES SETUP: VTS integration with Yardi, MRI, and other property management systems requires configuration; automated instant PM integration assumption creates disconnected_systems without integration setup; automated must configure PM system connections.

auth.notes: VTS uses OAuth2 for CRE platform REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2012 by Nick Romito and Ryan Masiello. Products: VTS Platform (leasing + asset management), VTS Rise (tenant experience), VTS Market (market intelligence), VTS Data. 9B+ sq ft managed. 45,000+ users. Backed by Insight Partners and Fifth Wall. Competes with CoStar, Altus Group, and Yardi for CRE platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified CRE organizations; production requires VTS subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by portfolio size (sq ft); platform modules; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: New York NY. Insight Partners backed. Annual subscription. 9B+ sq ft managed. CRE market leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; deal and portfolio APIs throttled per organization plan

known_agent_gotchas: CRE LEASE STRUCTURES ARE COMPLEX: Commercial leases have complex terms (free rent, TI allowances, rent steps, holdover); automated simple lease assumption creates missing_lease_terms for complex commercial lease structures; automated must map all CRE-specific lease terms to VTS data model

DEAL STAGES REFLECT INTERNAL WORKFLOW: VTS deal stages map to each company's internal leasing workflow; automated universal stage assumption creates stage_not_found for company-specific pipeline stages; automated must query each organization's configured pipeline stages

SPACE AVAILABILITY IS REAL-TIME: VTS space availability changes as deals progress; automated static availability assumption creates stale_availability for spaces with active deal pipelines; automated must query current availability and check deal status

TENANT CONFIDENTIALITY IS IMPORTANT: CRE tenant information is commercially sensitive; automated public data assumption creates confidentiality_risk for sharing tenant deal terms; automated must implement appropriate access controls for deal and tenant data

STACK PLAN REQUIRES BUILDING CONFIGURATION: VTS stack plan (floor plate visualization) requires building floor configuration; automated instant visualization assumption creates missing_floor_config for buildings without stack plan setup; automated must configure building floors before stack plan queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRE asset management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/UK. Commercial property and tenant deal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRE leasing. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/UK. Commercial property and tenant data.
